codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature contract: runtime/constants.ts and runtime/errors.ts were added, summary/transitions/tools now consume centralized slash-command constants, no inline /flow literals remain on nextCommand lines outside constants.ts, and runtime tool error envelopes are centralized via errorResponse.

summary: Reviewed handoff, transcript skeleton, and commit f20c325. The feature is complete and aligned with expected behavior; no blocking or non-blocking defects were found.
